chapter_title.en: Chapter 39 – Penalty (Hadd) of the grave robber

text: أُتِيَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِرَجُلٍ نَبَّاشٍ فَأَخَذَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِشَعْرِهِ فَضَرَبَ بِهِ الْأَرْضَ ثُمَّ أَمَرَ النَّاسَ أَنْ يَطَئُوهُ بِأَرْجُلِهِمْ فَوَطِئُوهُ حَتَّى مَاتَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from someone else from our companions who said,

‘They came to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> with a grave robber man. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> grabbed him by his hair, and struck him down on the ground. Then he<sup>asws</sup> ordered the people that they should trample upon him with their feet. So he was trampled until he died’.
